text:
The goal bearing is +175°, which is almost directly behind the current heading (0°). To face the goal, I need to turn around. A single TURN_LEFT or TURN_RIGHT only rotates 30°, so I will start by turning right to begin aligning with the target.

Action: TURN_RIGHT

message.content:
The goal bearing is +175°, which is almost directly behind the current heading (0°). To face the goal, I need to turn around. A single TURN_LEFT or TURN_RIGHT only rotates 30°, so I will start by turning right to begin aligning with the target.

Action: TURN_RIGHT

text:
After turning right once, my yaw is now -30° and the goal bearing is -155°. This means the goal is still significantly to my left (behind-left). Since I turned right and the goal is now on the left side, I should turn left to align with the goal.

Action: TURN_LEFT

message.content:

Action: TURN_LEFT

text:
After three turns, my yaw is now -90° and the goal bearing is -95°. The goal is now almost directly ahead (only 5° off to the left). Since I'm nearly aligned with the goal and the distance is still far (1421 cm), I should move forward to make progress.

Action: MOVE_FORWARD

message.content:

Action: MOVE_FORWARD

text:
